caption: A person's hands are shown interacting with sports trading cards over a red and black surface featuring the "JASPYS" logo and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the beginning, the person holds a holographic basketball card above a black box labeled "OBSIDIAN". As the sequence progresses, the person slides the card closer to the box, revealing a player in a black jersey. A small inset window in the corner of the video shows a man with a beard wearing a black hoodie, watching the process. The focus shifts to close-ups of the cards, which feature metallic patterns and a basketball player. One of the cards is placed on the "OBSIDIAN" box, and the person continues to manipulate the cards and their packaging, which includes clear plastic sleeves. The scene remains focused on the hands and the cards, with the "JASPYS" branding remaining visible throughout the clip.
